heading: Governing body
label: 70904 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70904(a)36:278(a)–(c), (e)., .Aug. 30, 1950, ch. 823, § 864 Stat. 56570904(b)36:278(d).In subsection (a), the text of 36:278(e) is omitted as obsolete. In paragraph (2), the words “Secretary of Education” and “Department of Education” are substituted for “Chief of the Agricultural Education Service, Office of Education, Federal Security Agency” and “Agricultural Education Service, Office of Education, Federal Security Agency”, respectively, in (ch. 823, ), because of sections 5 and 8 of Reorganization Plan No. 1 of 1953 (5 App. U.S.C.) and 20:3441 and 3507.section 8(a) of the Act of August 30, 195064 Stat. 565

L. 116–7, § 5(2)Governing Committee

children.text: The board of directors is the governing body of the FFA. The board shall exercise the powers granted to the FFA.

children.label: i
children.text: the Secretary of Education, or the Secretary of Education’s designee who has experience in agricultural education, the FFA, or career and technical education; and

children.label: I
children.text: representing the fields of education, agriculture, food, and natural resources; or

children.label: II
children.text: with experience working closely with the FFA; and

children.label: B
children.text: shall not include any individual who is a current employee of the National FFA Organization.
The number of directors, terms of office of the directors, and the method of selecting the directors, are as provided in the constitution or bylaws of the FFA.

The board shall meet at least annually at the time and place provided in the constitution or bylaws of the FFA. The annual report of the board shall be presented at that meeting. Special meetings of the board may be called at any time by the chair.

The board may designate a governing committee. The terms and method of selecting the governing committee members are as provided in the constitution or bylaws of the FFA, except that all members of the governing committee shall be members of the board of directors and at all times the governing committee shall be comprised of not less than 3 individuals.

When the board is not in session, the governing committee has the powers of the board subject to the board’s direction and may authorize the seal of the FFA to be affixed to all papers that require it.

children.label: B
children.text: the executive secretary of the board; and
